description: Cross-print 1:1 mirror of the same species (Tauros, Kanto #128) across two consecutive-era TCG sets (Team Up SM9, Darkness Ablaze SWSH3). Both quote the canonical Pokedex flavor text verbatim, both depict the dynamic-charging-with-three-tails pose on rocky mountain terrain — the designer-coordinated cross-set continuity signature of a species-anchor depiction. Cleanest standard option this pass; refused the Cubone+Yveltal speculative cluster and the premature solo-node candidates (Sonia, Ingo+Emmet, Voltorb, Alcremie-cycle).
other_candidates_considered: Cubone + Yveltal death-and-grief speculative cluster — REFUSED, thematic-vibe-not-canonical-edge.
Sonia solo node — DEFERRED, single corpus card below threshold.
Ingo + Emmet TAG TEAM solo split — DEFERRED, no solo prints in corpus to trigger the parallel-to-Mallow node-promotion pattern.
Voltorb / Pokedex-100 / tsukumogami thematic node — DEFERRED, single corpus card below threshold.
Alcremie forms-cycle node — DEFERRED, only Milcery in corpus, no Alcremie variants yet.
macro-cosmos <-> aether-foundation related_characters audit — both nodes already cross-edged from wave 24 + wave 28 commissioning, no sync drift detected.
